consequence_features.motif: Consequence: motion finally stops or locks

items.inspection_priority: Inspect the rotational support interface: bearing, bushing, axle, shaft, mount, or hub.

matched_consequences.motif: Consequence: motion finally stops or locks

items.mechanism_explanation: The observed system has a rotating part whose support interface shows friction, wear, noise, or stoppage.
items.observed_system: The system stopped. Before that it became noisy. Before that it ran hotter. Before that efficiency slowly declined.
items.question: Observed system: The system stopped. Before that it became noisy. Before that it ran hotter. Before that efficiency slowly declined. Question: Which learned mechanism category would make this reversed observation chain expected?

source_tracebacks.trace_expectation: A mapped SUPPORTED_ROTATION answer must cite at least three of Rotation, Support, Friction, and Failure.

items.observed_system: Nothing passed. Before that receivers waited. Before that the backlog built. Before that the delivery rate dropped.
